title: Senior IT Analyst (Infrastructure)
description:
Interested applicants are invited to apply directly at the NUS Career Portal

Your application will be processed only if you apply via NUS Career Portal

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Job Description

Duties & Responsibilities
• Provide infrastructure (hardware/software), end user and data management support to research groups within the school and for external collaborations.
• Configuration of environments and release of applications to Windows/IIS/MSSQL/LAMP environments.
• Support of research computing environments including provisioning and import/export of data.
• Perform Database Administration tasks.
• Troubleshooting of issues reported in deployed applications and other research environments with developers.
• Maintaining data standards, including adherence to internal processes, the Personal Data Protection Act, Human Biomedical Research Act and other legislation as required.
• Participate in Disaster Recovery team in the event of serious IT issue (some work beyond office hours may be required if activated).
• Any other projects based on current requirements.

Qualifications

  1. Recognised degree/diploma in computing related disciplines, from recognised institutions.
  2. Required knowledge: SQL query language, Windows Server & Microsoft SQL Server, IIS 10.
  3. Experience with the following technologies would be beneficial: Active Directory, Linux (Server), EMC OneFS 9+, Terminal Services/Remote Desktop Services and basic web programming for application hosting troubleshooting (e.g. C#, ASP.net, PHP), Network administration, Cisco IOS.
  4. Good team player, able to work with people of all technical levels and backgrounds (e.g. IT Professionals, Research Staff, Students).
  5. Self-motivated with the ability to prioritize tasks and work independently.
  6. Strong analytical skills and meticulous over details.
  7. Excellent written and verbal communications skills.

postedCompany.description:
The National University of Singapore aspires to be a vital community of academics, researchers, staff, students and alumni working together in a spirit of innovation and enterprise for a better world.

 

Our singular focus on talent will be the cornerstone of a truly great university that is dedicated to quality education, influential research and visionary enterprise, in service of country and society.
